title: Technology Broker Unlocks
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS unlocks FROM TechnologyBroker WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate
detailQuery: SELECT ItemsUnlocked AS label, 1 AS value FROM TechnologyBroker WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate ORDER BY event_timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

details.text: {unlocks} technology broker unlock(s) completed during the report period. Tech broker unlocks are major one-time progression milestones — Guardian modules and meta-alloy reinforcements represent access to some of the most powerful non-engineered equipment available to any Pilots Federation member.
details.help: TechnologyBroker fires per unlock transaction. ItemsUnlocked contains the unlocked item name. unlocks drives the title as the total milestone count.

tagLines: Technology broker unlock records compiled. Pilots Federation technology access grants confirmed.
Each unlock was a grind to reach. The materials don't accumulate easily, and the broker doesn't offer refunds.
Guardian tech. Human innovation. The brokers sit between both. You paid into both queues.
